content: Self-Refine's iterative, training-free self-feedback framework can serve as a lightweight backbone to unify multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, solving the problem of complex multi-perspective reflection requiring extra supervised training. This combination creates a zero-training multi-perspective self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's accessibility while gaining the robustness of multi-view reflection from existing LLM self-reflection research.
